name: Design documentation, expertise & construction permit
description: Проектная документация (стадия П), положительное заключение экспертизы и разрешение на строительство (ст.51 ГрК РФ). The technical customer accepts the design-and-permit milestone; the fixed design fee is certified and the excavation phase is unlocked. Building-level scope (zone=BLDG).

evidence.description: Проектная документация (стадия П, разделы ПОС/КР/АР) — stage-P design set lodged for expert review.
Положительное заключение экспертизы (ГГЭ / негос. экспертиза) — the legal precondition for the permit.
Разрешение на строительство (ст.51 ГрК РФ) — issued by the building authority; carries permit_no and validity.
Градостроительный план земельного участка (ГПЗУ) — fixes the build envelope.

checks.description: The permit is not valid without the design set and a positive expertise conclusion.
The construction-permit number must be recorded.
Permit validity start is on/after the project baseline.

consequences.description: Design milestone paid in full (lump), no retention.
The technical customer owns permit validity.
